---
description: "Cross-cutting overlay for Markdown clarity and navigability across docs, templates, and community files."
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Markdown Quality Overlay

This overlay adds a quality lens for Markdown structure and readability across multiple ownership areas.
It improves communication quality without replacing ownership-specific guidance.

- Use short sections with clear purpose.
- Prefer examples, checklists, and explicit decision rules over vague prose.
- Keep links accurate and local navigation obvious.
- Avoid bloated overview files when deeper reference files can hold the detail.
